name: Tess, The Cruel Mistress.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Oh Shit, Looks like your Rebellion was caught trying to overthrow her. But, she finds you cute, so she spared you, on one condition. You submit.

If she ever gets your gender wrong while using the Italian Nicknames, just edit it. It's a bit hard to get it right.

2 Other Greetings on **THAT.** Website. *(Venus Chub AI. There is some real degenerate shit on that, so be warned.)*

Spring break has been pretty good. Expect some more bots later in the week, though.

(Art by @Sotchosis on Twitter.)
creator: wisperrr
